message: Command `find / -type f -name "*.tar.gz" 2>/dev/null | while read f; do tar -tzf "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "vul\|vulnerability" && echo "$f"; done` executed with exit code 1.

function.arguments: {"command": "find / -type f -name \"*.tar.gz\" 2>/dev/null | while read f; do tar -tzf \"$f\" 2>/dev/null | grep -q \"vul\\|vulnerability\" && echo \"$f\"; done"}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command: find / -type f -name "*.tar.gz" 2>/dev/null | while read f; do tar -tzf "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "vul\|vulnerability" && echo "$f"; done
